name: autonomous-builder
description: Autonomously plans, implements, and reviews multi-step work in a codebase. An orchestrator agent drafts a phased plan with MoSCoW-prioritised acceptance criteria, gets the user's approval, then runs each task through an implementer and a reviewer with adaptive retry, plan-revision on PLAN_WRONG, and per-phase user checkpoints. Phase Definition of Done supports `[Journey]` AC exercised against the running system by a `tester` subagent on three surfaces (CLI / HTTP API / web). Per-session reflector promotes durable codebase facts to `/memories/repo/autonomous-builder.md` so the planner reads them on the next session (compounding context across plans). Cross-session reflector mode (`/autonomous-reflect`) mines recurring patterns across multiple sessions. Hardened for use in large or legacy codebases via a shared Discoveries log.
